reviews.comment:
Atención, cordialidad, esmero, son calificativos para ese lugar desde el expendio de combustible hasta el dragstor

(Translated by Google)
Attention, friendliness, and care are all qualities that describe this place, from the gas station to the drag strip.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien en la limpieza. El personal muy amable destacó la limpieza de los baños

(Translated by Google)
Very clean. The staff was very friendly and the cleanliness of the bathrooms was particularly noteworthy.
